articles.headline: New extortion group targets OneDrive and SharePoint for rapid data exfiltration
articles.summary: A threat group tracked as CL-CRI-1147 has shifted from traditional ransomware to fast data theft from cloud storage environments such as OneDrive and SharePoint. That creates direct operational and compliance risk for businesses using Microsoft 365, especially where file-sharing controls and identity protections are weak.

articles.headline: Apple leans on Google Gemini for 'Apple Intelligence'
articles.summary: Apple’s WWDC AI strategy routes heavier tasks to Google’s Gemini models while keeping lighter inference on-device, which signals a pragmatic shift toward hybrid AI and could influence enterprise device planning and AI app expectations. The same update also suggests Apple is doubling down on Apple Silicon and long-term platform control, with implications for business fleets and software compatibility.

articles.headline: Meta ties up with Reliance for first AI-enabled data center in India
articles.summary: Meta’s partnership with Reliance to build its first AI-enabled data center in India signals more local AI infrastructure for one of the world’s largest markets. For businesses, this can affect cloud capacity, latency, and the availability of AI services in India, while also reinforcing capital spending tied to AI demand.
